sourcesContent:
export const PATHS = {
  HOME: '/',
  LOGIN: '/login',
  PROFILE: '/profile',
  SETTINGS: '/settings',
  ABOUT: '/about',
  TODO: '/todo',
  TODO_VIEW: '/todo/:id',
  COUNTERS: '/counters',
  LIFECYCLE: '/lifecycle',
  HOOKS: '/hooks',
  ROUTER: '/router-guide',
  POSTS: {
    ROOT: '/posts',
    VIEW: '/posts/:id',
  },
};
